raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year> I was charged an additional fee from XXXX XXXX XXXX 
I disputed the charge with Citibank via phone and email to their dispute center ( XXXX ) They rejected the dispute. 
I provided the additional information they requested which was the actual receipt from XXXX. Citibank still rejected my dispute. 
I have spoken to XXXX every other week in this matter as well as emailing them requested paperwork. 
I also contacted the billing department at XXXX XXXX XXXX and they submitted a credit with Citibank towards my account as they agreed I did not owe the money. 
Citibank again rejected my dispute. 
I contacted XXXX XXXX  again and they emailed me an official XXXX XXXX including a case XXXX  and credit memo XXXX  which I emailed to Citibank along with a phone call. 
They have rejected the credit memo. 
There is absolutely no reason why my account is not refunded the {$450.00} as I have documentation on this contunual dispute. Upon escalated calls with Citibank, they agree that I have submitted sufficient documentation, but claim it is out of their hands and XXXX is holding the money. This is a Citibank XXXX and they should be working together to refund my money. Thank XXXX XXXX
